requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (NM/IEC-CISPR 14 via INNOQ; INCM for radio)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（经INNOQ采纳的NM/IEC-CISPR 14；无线电由INCM监管）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（經INNOQ採納的NM/IEC-CISPR 14；無線電由INCM監管）

summary.en: Mozambique does not operate a single horizontal EMC directive analogous to the EU EMC Directive. Electromagnetic compatibility for household appliances is addressed through INNOQ-adopted international standards — the CISPR 14 / IEC 60335 family (emission CISPR 14-1, immunity CISPR 14-2) adopted as NM standards — applied where conformity assessment for regulated electrical products requires it. Separately, where a refrigerator includes a wireless/radio module (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth for smart-home features), the radiocommunications regulator INCM (Instituto Nacional das Comunicacoes de Mocambique) governs type approval and spectrum use; such modules require INCM authorisation independent of the appliance safety/EMC pathway. For a standard (non-connected) household refrigerator, EMC is typically demonstrated via test reports against the adopted CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2 (IEC) basis, and import consignments of regulated products may be subject to INNOQ import inspection. Exact regulated-product scope and whether EMC test reports are required at import should be confirmed with INNOQ and (for radio modules) INCM.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克没有类似欧盟EMC指令的单一横向电磁兼容指令。家用器具的电磁兼容通过INNOQ采纳的国际标准处理——CISPR 14 / IEC 60335系列（发射CISPR 14-1、抗扰度CISPR 14-2）以NM标准形式采纳——在受监管电气产品的合格评定有要求时适用。另外，若电冰箱含无线/射频模块（用于智能家居功能的Wi-Fi、蓝牙），无线电通信监管机构INCM（莫桑比克国家通信研究所）负责型式核准和频谱使用；此类模块须取得INCM授权，独立于器具的安全/EMC路径。对于标准（非联网）家用电冰箱，EMC通常通过依据所采纳CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2（IEC）基础的检测报告证明，受监管产品进口货物可能须经INNOQ进口检验。受监管产品的确切范围以及进口时是否须提供EMC检测报告，应向INNOQ及（对射频模块）INCM核实。
summary.zht: 莫三比克沒有類似歐盟EMC指令的單一橫向電磁相容指令。家用器具的電磁相容透過INNOQ採納的國際標準處理——CISPR 14 / IEC 60335系列（發射CISPR 14-1、抗擾度CISPR 14-2）以NM標準形式採納——在受監管電氣產品的合格評定有要求時適用。另外，若電冰箱含無線/射頻模組（用於智慧家居功能的Wi-Fi、藍牙），無線電通信監管機構INCM（莫三比克國家通信研究所）負責型式核准和頻譜使用；此類模組須取得INCM授權，獨立於器具的安全/EMC路徑。對於標準（非聯網）家用電冰箱，EMC通常透過依據所採納CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2（IEC）基礎的檢測報告證明，受監管產品進口貨物可能須經INNOQ進口檢驗。受監管產品的確切範圍以及進口時是否須提供EMC檢測報告，應向INNOQ及（對射頻模組）INCM核實。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 14-1 (IEC) — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (adopted as the corresponding NM standard via INNOQ where applied)
CISPR 14-2 (IEC) — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (adopted as the corresponding NM standard via INNOQ where applied)
INCM (Instituto Nacional das Comunicacoes de Mocambique) — radiocommunications regulator; type approval and spectrum authorisation for any wireless/radio module in the appliance

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1 applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China and Mozambique build EMC requirements on the same CISPR 14 base, the underlying technical content is closely related; however, a Chinese CCC EMC test report is not automatically accepted by INNOQ and conformity to the adopted NM/IEC-CISPR standard must be demonstrated separately where required.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国和莫桑比克的EMC要求均以同一CISPR 14为基础，底层技术内容密切相关；但中国CCC的EMC检测报告不被INNOQ自动接受，在有要求时须另行证明符合所采纳的NM/IEC-CISPR标准。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國和莫三比克的EMC要求均以同一CISPR 14為基礎，底層技術內容密切相關；但中國CCC的EMC檢測報告不被INNOQ自動接受，在有要求時須另行證明符合所採納的NM/IEC-CISPR標準。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2)
GB 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Mozambique has no horizontal EMC directive imposing a uniform mandatory EMC conformity gate on every appliance — EMC is handled through INNOQ-adopted CISPR 14 standards applied within conformity assessment of regulated electrical products, plus INCM type approval for any radio module. The gaps for a Chinese exporter are therefore: (1) Recognition — Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC EMC test data is not automatically accepted by INNOQ; where EMC conformity is required, a test report against the adopted CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2 basis (ideally an internationally recognised CB / ILAC MRA report) should be prepared. Because GB 4343.1 and CISPR 14-1 share the same base, much underlying test data is technically reusable but must be re-presented against the recognised standard. (2) Wireless modules — any Wi-Fi/Bluetooth-enabled smart refrigerator requires separate INCM type approval and spectrum authorisation; this is a distinct, mandatory radio-regulatory gate with no Chinese-CCC substitute. (3) Scope uncertainty — whether a stand-alone (non-connected) refrigerator triggers a mandatory EMC test at import should be confirmed directly with INNOQ.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，莫桑比克没有对每件器具施加统一强制EMC合格门槛的横向EMC指令——EMC通过INNOQ采纳的CISPR 14标准在受监管电气产品的合格评定中处理，外加任何射频模块的INCM型式核准。因此中国出口商的差距为：（1）承认——中国GB 4343.1的CCC EMC检测数据不被INNOQ自动接受；在须证明EMC合格时，应准备依据所采纳CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2基础的检测报告（最好为国际承认的CB / ILAC MRA报告）。由于GB 4343.1与CISPR 14-1共享同一基础，大量底层检测数据技术上可复用，但须依据被承认的标准重新呈现。（2）无线模块——任何具Wi-Fi/蓝牙功能的智能冰箱须另行取得INCM型式核准及频谱授权；这是独立的强制性无线电监管门槛，无中国CCC替代。（3）范围不确定性——独立（非联网）冰箱在进口时是否触发强制EMC检测，应直接向INNOQ核实。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，莫三比克沒有對每件器具施加統一強制EMC合格門檻的橫向EMC指令——EMC透過INNOQ採納的CISPR 14標準在受監管電氣產品的合格評定中處理，外加任何射頻模組的INCM型式核准。因此中國出口商的差距為：（1）承認——中國GB 4343.1的CCC EMC檢測數據不被INNOQ自動接受；在須證明EMC合格時，應準備依據所採納CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2基礎的檢測報告（最好為國際承認的CB / ILAC MRA報告）。由於GB 4343.1與CISPR 14-1共享同一基礎，大量底層檢測數據技術上可複用，但須依據被承認的標準重新呈現。（2）無線模組——任何具Wi-Fi/藍牙功能的智慧冰箱須另行取得INCM型式核准及頻譜授權；這是獨立的強制性無線電監管門檻，無中國CCC替代。（3）範圍不確定性——獨立（非聯網）冰箱在進口時是否觸發強制EMC檢測，應直接向INNOQ核實。

mandatory_status.target: No single horizontal EMC directive; EMC handled via INNOQ-adopted CISPR 14 standards within conformity assessment of regulated electrical products. Any wireless/radio module requires mandatory INCM type approval. Exact EMC scope at import should be confirmed with INNOQ.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: INCM — Instituto Nacional das Comunicacoes de Mocambique (radio) / INNOQ (standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique has no EU-style horizontal EMC directive; EMC for refrigerators is handled through INNOQ-adopted CISPR 14 standards (same base as China's GB 4343.1, so technical data is largely reusable) and applies within conformity assessment of regulated products. Any wireless module requires separate, mandatory INCM type approval. Confirm with INNOQ whether a non-connected refrigerator requires an EMC test report at import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克没有欧盟式横向EMC指令；冰箱的EMC通过INNOQ采纳的CISPR 14标准处理（与中国GB 4343.1基础相同，故技术数据大体可复用），在受监管产品合格评定中适用。任何无线模块须另行取得强制性INCM型式核准。请向INNOQ确认非联网冰箱进口时是否须提供EMC检测报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克沒有歐盟式橫向EMC指令；冰箱的EMC透過INNOQ採納的CISPR 14標準處理（與中國GB 4343.1基礎相同，故技術數據大體可複用），在受監管產品合格評定中適用。任何無線模組須另行取得強制性INCM型式核准。請向INNOQ確認非聯網冰箱進口時是否須提供EMC檢測報告。
